content.speakerText: Hey, I'm your neighbor on the 3rd floor. I noticed you're moving in — need any help?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我是三楼的邻居，看到你在搬东西，需要帮忙吗？
expectedAnswers: Oh, thanks so much! I'm Sam. I think I'm okay for now, but I'll let you know if I need a hand!
That's really kind of you! I'm Alex. I appreciate the offer!
Hi! I'm Jamie. Not right now, but I'll definitely take you up on that later!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应帮助提议并自我介绍
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的感谢语和委婉表达（如 'I'll let you know'）
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、不生硬，符合邻里间自然互动
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'help', 'I'm', 'appreciate' 等社交关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你在楼道里遇到新搬来的邻居，想主动打招呼并询问对方的名字，营造友好氛围
content.speakerText: Hi! I live across the hall. I'm Sam. What's your name?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！我住在对面。我是萨姆，你叫什么名字？
expectedAnswers: Hi Sam! I'm Jordan. Nice to meet you!
Hey! I'm Taylor. Thanks for saying hi!
Hi! I just moved in yesterday—I'm Priya. Great to meet you!
Oh hey! I'm Mike. Welcome to the building!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了问候并询问对方名字
语言准确性：语法和拼写是否正确，人称代词使用是否恰当
表达自然度：语气是否友好、符合日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'name', 'hi', 'meet' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你在电梯里遇到新邻居，想轻松开启对话并表达欢迎，同时询问对方是否刚搬来
content.speakerText: Hey! This is your first time in the building, right?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿！这是你第一次住在这栋楼吧？
expectedAnswers: Yes, just moved in this morning! I'm Chloe.
You got it! I'm Daniel. Still figuring out where everything is!
Yep! Got the keys yesterday. Really glad to be here.
That's right! I'm Elena. Hope I don't break the elevator!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确回应了关于是否刚搬来的询问
语言准确性：时态使用是否正确（如 just moved in），冠词和介词是否恰当
表达自然度：语气是否轻松、有生活气息，是否带点幽默或亲切感
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'moved in', 'first time', 'building' 等场景关键词
